title: Question: verilator unpacked dimension signal dependency without circular logic error

features.name: unpacked array access via loop index with self-reference
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array accessed through a for-loop index where an element at index i references the same array at a smaller index (i-1 or earlier)

features.name: two-dimensional unpacked array for selection
features.description: Code should include a two-dimensional unpacked array used as a select/mux signal with first dimension as bit vector

features.name: generate loop wrapping always_comb to avoid circular dependency
features.description: Code should include a generate-for loop wrapping an always_comb block to work around false circular logic detection on unpacked arrays
features.snippet:
generate
  for(genvar i = 0; i < NUM_FOO; i++) begin
     always_comb begin
       foo[i] = foo[i-1];
     end
  end
endgenerate
